name: 撒糖型（霸道深情）
description: 太子在生死關頭用笨拙但深情的方式表達感情，把對女主生活細節的了解一一說出。這種對白的威力在於反差——平時冷酷的男主突然細膩到令人心碎。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: She is a timid person and afraid of losing her life. Her health is poor and she is sensitive to the cold. Send her to the south. Find a courtyard house with sufficient funds enough for the rest of her life. Also, she is lustful and disregards rules. Please find her a bodyguard, someone with an excellent appearance to protect her closely.
